feat2.rawMD:
# What's included

---

✅ **Community Races**:

Participate in our daily beginner-friendly Racing Club Community Events.

---

✅ **Unlimited Downloads**:

Access thousands of mods, cars, tracks, and liveries without speed limits or download - restrictions.

---

**✅ Coaching and Setups:**

Get one FREE esports grade HYMO setup a month with AI coaching and real-time lap analysis - with OverTake Turbo.

---

**✅ No More Ads!:**

Enjoy a 100% Ad-Free Experience.

---

**✅ Exclusive Deals & Discounts:**

Save up to 10% on select premium hardware brands.

---

✅ **Community Reviews:**

Apply for hardware testing and reviewing to gain new gear and share your expertise.

---

**✅ Support your Community:** Receive a premium banner on your profile that shows your support for the community.

---

# What's include

- [Esquire Style Guides.](https://www.esquire.com/style/a61986090/how-to-dress-well/) Expert advice on how to dress for any occasion, plus customized style guides upon request.

- **Unlimited Access to Esquire.com.** Dozens of new stories every day—all of which you can bookmark and read at your leisure.

- **Subscription to the Print Magazine.** Six handcrafted issues a year that will look great on your coffee table.

- **Man At His Best.** First-hand accounts of what it’s like to be a man in America now.

- **A Weekly Newsletter from the Editor in Chief.** Behind-the-scenes intel, including all the stuff that doesn’t make it into print.

- **Access to the archive.** Every issue of Esquire going all the way back to 1933, featuring the works of many titans of literature and journalism.

- **Politics with Charles P. Pierce.** Daily stories, a weekly newsletter, and regular conference calls with one of the greatest living political writers.

# With your subscription, you'll enjoy:

- **Quarterly issues of the award-winning *Alta Journal*:** Delivered straight to your door, each issue is filled with captivating stories and insights that celebrate California life.

- **Unlimited, ad-free access:** Dive into altaonline.com with no interruptions, plus explore our exclusive digital archive of past issues.

- **A FREE copy of *California Rewritten* by John Freeman:** This October’s California Book Club selection, valued at $30, is yours to keep as a token of our appreciation.

- **Staying informed with the Alta Weekly Newsletter:** Packed with original reporting, it’s your go-to source for the latest happenings in California and the West.

✅ Open API

➕ Lite Concierge [💡]{2X More likely to go live under 60 days. 2 Hours of live done-with-you implementation Zoom calls with a dedicated representative. 4 Live community training sessions per month. 48 Hour Response time on support tickets. Live chat & phone support}

➕ Full Concierge [💡]{4X More likely to go live under 60 days. 5 Hours of live done-for-you implementation Zoom calls with a dedicated representative. 4 Live community training sessions per month. 24 Hour Response time on support tickets. Live chat & phone support}

Live Q&A and guidance through the platform. Help with configuring your settings. Troubleshooting any issues with a live team member.}

🌟 **Included Support:** [Video library](https://www.lendingwise.com/video-library/), tickets, [knowledgebase](https://help.lendingwise.com/knowledge), [LendingWise University](https://courses.lendingwise.com/courses/offers/fcba256d-73f7-4d48-b200-5fbc1886d642) & 1 hour of complimentary implementation support

feat12.rawMD:
🚀 For established/mid-size broker teams/lenders handling a high volume of loans per month

#

**What's included:**

✅ **5 Users** for back office or loan officer

✅ **Unlimited** brokers [💡]{You can add unlimited brokers to your account. Each Broker will be able to have their own portal to upload docs and submit applications directly to you.}

✅ Point of sale ([Quick App](https://www.veralend.com/get-a-loan) &[ Full App](https://www.veralend.com/multi-step-form))

✅ Built-in docs & forms w/ unlimited E-sign ([Term Sheet](https://app.lendingwise.com/package/pkgController.php?file=Frank_Flipper-Loan_Term_Sheet.pdf&rId=a5b73cb55ffb2a0b&bn=b96bbd80e83aaf7d&lId=6323a31b0c6a6189&pkgID=7ac260486286177b&opt=sample), 1003, [Full App](https://app.lendingwise.com/package/pkgController.php?file=Frank_Flipper-Full_Loan_Application.pdf&rId=a5b73cb55ffb2a0b&bn=b96bbd80e83aaf7d&lId=6323a31b0c6a6189&pkgID=d45df7967cd9c37b&opt=sample) & 20+ more docs)

✅ Dashboard, pipeline, contact manager

✅ Pre-built & customizable settings for fields, workflows, required docs & loan stages

✅ Loan status & doc upload portal

✅ Portals for borrower, broker, & LO's

✅ Unlimited soft pull [💡]{We partnered with Acqualify to provide modeled credit scores using experian credit data. Clients with low scores will be offered credit repair, and you are notified when credit is above your threshold. }

✅ Lender or investor overlays [💡]{Overlay additional fields, workflow steps & required docs based on investor & lender requirements}

✅ Doc wizard (DIY doc templates)

✅ Lender Marketplace & Deal Room

✅ Workflow automation & rules engine with webhooks

✅ Bulk email marketing

✅ Integrations: tri-merge, background, flood, AVM, instant prop insurance quotes, Lightning Docs

✅ [Webform to PDF](https://app.lendingwise.com/backoffice/viewDocuments.php?fn=c48f134c67da4cd427f93c9938581f6c3b0354d8761b3ccc7c7d546ba19d4b5e30901a867d9417f953698a17f999a3bc4fd2e34a25a8ac5625702b7197aae08f3381b169f10a32f78fd719b6fdc21400277d090a37a64307695a1c6316e82581&fd=917859610d92329bbc3da1df2ba3d8ede4ab6a17202da0ecdfd1f83c552a23fe1058936524cddbcfd736749f0ed44598&opt=enc&dn=c48f134c67da4cd427f93c9938581f6c3b0354d8761b3ccc7c7d546ba19d4b5e30901a867d9417f94b159946ce9fbf739a0f2e08bdd5b97835aefaf7d2261740) [💡]{Your digital quick & full app webforms convert to PDF with E-signs. }

✅ Lender Marketplace & Deal Room [💡]{Gain access to hundreds of vetted lenders and submit offers directly to them to get more deals done. Also have the ability to add your own list of lenders to your personal marketplace to submit deals.}

✅ [Website template](https://www.templates.lendingwise.com/) with free hosting

#

💸 **Add Ons:**

➕ VIP Support- live chat, on demand zoom & priority support

➕ Premium CRM

➕ Loan Servicing

➕ Pricing Engine

➕ White Label [💡]{Run the entire platform on your own domain, E-mails sent from your domain & removal of powered by LendingWise logo on webforms. }

➕ Open API

➕ Marketplace Listing

#

🌟 **Included Support:** Video library, e-mail, phone & 2 Hours of complimentary implementation support.

# Programmerkmale

- 1 Schliessanlage

- Bis zu 500 Zylinder

- Firebird 4 (Einzelplatz)

# Ausstattungsmerkmale

- QuickTiles-Dashboard

- Automatische Datensicherung

- Befristete Ausgaben (zeitlich begrenzt)

- Datenimport nahezu aller Hersteller,

- durch Benutzer selbst

- Defektmeldungen

- Detaillierte Historie aller Bewegungen

- Digitale Unterschriften (mit zusätzl. Hardware)

- Elektronisches Bestellwesen

- Erinnerung an fällige Rückgaben (Reminder)

- Exemplar-genaue Ausgaben

- (Schlüssel+Exemplarnummer)

- Gruppenschlüsselverwaltung, vollständige Detailinformation

- Identifikation durch kundenseitig genutzte Transponder

- (zusätzliche Hardware)

- Passwortschutz

- Personalverwaltung mit Datenimport +

- automatischer Abgleich

- Quittungsdruck für Schlüsselbewegungen

- (Layout gestaltbar)

- Schließplan-Anzeige

- Sensitive Schlüssel für Revisionen

- Sicherungskarten einlesen (Lesegerät erforderlich)

- Umbuchung von Schlüsseln

- Vereinfachter Zugang durch „single sign on“

- Verlustmeldungen

- Zylinderverwaltung, inkl. Einbauhistorie

- Benutzerverwaltung, unterschiedliche Rechte durch Rollenprofile

# What's included

- **Smart Receipt Consolidation** Automatically gather and organize all your receipts from the current financial year—no manual tracking needed.

- **AI-Powered Deductible Analysis** Our intelligent system classifies receipts to identify deductible expenses, helping you stay tax-compliant and maximize savings.

- **CPA-Ready Downloadable Report** Export a fully consolidated file—clean, categorized, and ready to share with your accountant or CPA in just one click.

feat2.rawMD:
# ✅ Everything in Core, plus:

👥 [User Sync]{Automated provisioning of users via integrations with Active Directory, G-Suite, or any SCIM Directory (such as your HRIS). No manual entry, no room for error.}: Sync your team

📃 [SharePoint & Box Integration]{Give your team seamless access to the Microsoft 365 suite, helping get the best out of your Microsoft tools. When you connect Blink to SharePoint, you can display and access all SharePoint sites from the Blink Hub.}

🔂 [Single Sign-On]{One-click access to all your applications from within Blink. Any application that supports SAML can be integrated.}: 3rd-party access

⁉️ [Full Surveys]{Gather actionable insights and more reliable engagement metric with robust, long-form surveys.}: Multi-question

🈷️ [Auto Translation]{Ensure that Feed posts, comments, and pages are accessible in a user's preferred language without any action required.}: In 100+ languages

📋 [Custom Digital Forms]{Automate key processes and streamline internal workflows by creating and distributing Blink forms.}

🪄 [API Access]{Create apps and build automations with other systems through the Blink API.}: Powerful integrations

💰 [ePayslips]{Provide easy access to payslips in the Hub via integration with your pay provider.}: See payslips in Blink

📣 [Feed]{Bring the whole company together with a company News Feed that's fun, familiar and easy-to-use. Share stories, updates, and information to boost engagement.}, [Chats]{Make it easy to get everyone talking with Blink Chat. Create Group Chats for multiple team members, or message privately one to one.} & [Hub]{Help employees save time by storing systems, content, and processes in one convenient place.}

🎨[Custom branding]{Reinforce your brand identity by customising your Blink app with your company colours and logos.}: In-app

🛡️ [Biometric]{Protect your organisation's Blink environment and additional content by mandating a biometric security step upon entry.} & [SSO login]{One-click access to all your applications directly from Blink, via a secure SSO that IT teams and users alike will love.}

🏅 [Recognition]{Instant, personalised recognition for every employee. Recognition (known in Blink as Kudos) provides an easy way to make your employees feel valued in a meaningful way.} & [Mandatory Reads]{Ensure that no key communication or process update ever gets missed again by requiring employees to read and acknowledge important updates.}

🚡 [Journeys]{Boost retention and productivity in new starters by prescheduling posts for specific users based on customisable triggers. Deliver personalised content paths to enhance onboarding, training, and other experiences within Blink.}: Onboarding sequences

👥 [Dynamic Teams]{Automate group membership based on profile fields.}: Automate Groups

📈 [Analytics]{Get better insight into the people and relationships that your organisation runs on, providing the data you need to improve your employee experience.}: Intelligence dashboards

❓ [Surveys]{Boost response rates and gather actionable insights using Blink's native pulse survey feature.}: Single question

📱 [Stories]{Increase engagement by encouraging employee-generated content in a familiar, social media-inspired format.}: Social-media style

🤖 [Blink Assist]{Quickly generate and refine your ideas into polished posts. Tell Blink Assist what you want to communicate and how you want it to come across.}: AI-powered post creation

🏛️ Reserved for large orgs that need custom pricing, detailed SOW, & various integrations

✅ Customize your number of users

✅ Custom user permission

✅ Custom portals for borrowers, investors, etc..

#

💸 **Add Ons:**

➕ Lite Concierge [💡]{2X More likely to go live under 60 days. 2 Hours of live 1:1 Zoom calls with dedicated representative. 4 Live community training sessions per month}

➕ Full Concierge [💡]{4X More likely to go live under 30 days. 5 Hours of live. 1:1 Zoom calls with dedicated representative. 1:1 Quarterly business review & system audit. 4 Live community training sessions per month}

Live Q&A and guidance through the platform. Getting all your custom settings set up. Troubleshooting any issues with a live team member. Setting up needed integrations faster}

🌟 **Included Support:** [Video library](https://www.lendingwise.com/video-library/), tickets, [knowledgebase](https://help.lendingwise.com/knowledge), [LendingWise University](https://courses.lendingwise.com/courses/offers/fcba256d-73f7-4d48-b200-5fbc1886d642) & 1 hour of complimentary implementation support

# **(1) Priority Support Package:**

**Fast-Track Assistance:**

Priority support with a 2-hour SLA for faster response.

**Webinar:**

Access to training webinars to help your team get the most out of the platform.

**Help Center Resources:**

Access to support content and guides

**Expedited Bug Handling:**

Priority queue for bug reviews.

|

# **(2) Specialist Support Sessions:**

**Account Configuration & Training:**

4 hours of dedicated sessions per month with our support specialists, focusing on account configuration and platform training, partner integrations and performance reporting

Ongoing account provisioning

**Ongoing Support Calls:**

8 hours of scheduled meetings or calls per month for specialist training, troubleshooting, Q&A, or deeper platform guidance.

**Webinar:**

**Account Configuration**

Receive hands-on support to set up your account, including:

*Company information and Team member setup

*Payment configuration (pricing schemes, payment options, and adders)

*Key integrations (Finance, CashFlow, etc.)

*Hardware setup (module, inverter, battery and featured hardware)

**Support Sessions**

*Account configuration

*Team and admin training

*Advanced platform training

- **Extended Receipt Consolidation** Covers receipts from both the current and last financial year, giving you broader visibility and improved year-over-year insights.

- **AI-Powered Deductible Analysis** Our intelligent system classifies receipts to identify deductible expenses, helping you stay tax-compliant and maximize savings.

feat1.rawMD:
# ✅ What's included:

📣 [Feed]{Bring the whole company together with a company News Feed that's fun, familiar, and easy to use. Share stories, updates, and information to boost engagement.}, [Chats]{Make it easy to get everyone talking with Blink Chat. Create Group Chats for multiple team members, or message privately one to one.} & [Hub]{Help employees save time by storing systems, content, and processes in one convenient place.}

🎨[Custom branding]{Reinforce your brand identity by customizing your Blink app with your company colors and logos.}: In-app

🛡️ [Biometric]{Protect your organization's Blink environment and additional content by mandating a biometric security step upon entry.} & [SSO login]{One-click access to all your applications directly from Blink, via a secure SSO that IT teams and users alike will love.}

🏅 [Recognition]{Instant, personalized recognition for every employee. Recognition (known in Blink as Kudos) provides an easy way to make your employees feel valued in a meaningful way.} & [Mandatory Reads]{Ensure that no key communication or process update ever gets missed again by requiring employees to read and acknowledge important updates.}

🚡 [Journeys]{Boost retention and productivity in new starters by prescheduling posts for specific users based on customizable triggers. Deliver personalized content paths to enhance onboarding, training, and other experiences within Blink.}: Onboarding sequences

👥 [Dynamic Teams]{Automate group membership based on profile fields.}: Automate Groups

📈 [Analytics]{Get better insight into the people and relationships that your organization runs on, providing the data you need to improve your employee experience.}: Intelligence dashboards

❓ [Surveys]{Boost response rates and gather actionable insights using Blink's native pulse survey feature.}: Single question

📱 [Stories]{Increase engagement by encouraging employee-generated content in a familiar, social media-inspired format.}: Social-media style

🤖 [Blink Assist]{Quickly generate and refine your ideas into polished posts. Tell Blink Assist what you want to communicate and how you want it to come across.}: AI content creation

🎨[Custom branding]{Reinforce your brand identity by customizing your Blink app with your company colors and logos.}: In-app

Recognition (known in Blink as Kudos) provides an easy way to make your employees feel valued in a meaningful way.} & [Mandatory Reads]{Ensure that no key communication or process update ever gets missed again by requiring employees to read and acknowledge important updates.}

📱 [Stories]{Increase engagement by encouraging employee-generated content in a familiar, social media-inspired format.}: Social-media style

🤖 [Blink Assist]{Quickly generate and refine your ideas into polished posts. Tell Blink Assist what you want to communicate and how you want it to come across.}: AI content creation

feat2.rawMD:
# ✅ Everything in Core, plus:

👥 [User Sync]{Automated provisioning of users via integrations with Active Directory, G-Suite, or any SCIM Directory (such as your HRIS). No manual entry, no room for error.}: Sync your team

📃 [SharePoint & Box Integration]{Give your team seamless access to the Microsoft 365 suite, helping get the best out of your Microsoft tools. When you connect Blink to SharePoint, you can display and access all SharePoint sites from the Blink Hub.}

🔂 [Single Sign-On]{One-click access to all your applications from within Blink. Any application that supports SAML can be integrated.}: 3rd-party access

⁉️ [Full Surveys]{Gather actionable insights and more reliable engagement metric with robust, long-form surveys.}: Multi-question

🈷️ [Auto Translation]{Ensure that Feed posts, comments, and pages are accessible in a user's preferred language without any action required.}: In 100+ languages

📋 [Custom Digital Forms]{Automate key processes and streamline internal workflows by creating and distributing Blink forms.}

🌐 [Custom Domain]{Drive identity by configuring your unique Blink URL (e.g., yourorg.joinblink.com instead of the standard app.joinblink.com).}: Branded URL

🪄 [API Access]{Create apps and build automations with other systems through the Blink API.}: Powerful integrations

💰 [ePaystubs]{Provide easy access to paystubs in the Hub via integration with your pay provider.}: See paystubs in Blink

![aa](https://membership.prevention.com/media/catalog/product/e/s/esquire-all-access-membership-63712.png)

# What's included

- Esquire Style Guides. Expert advice on how to dress for any occasion, plus customized style guides upon request.

- Unlimited Access to Esquire.com. Dozens of new stories every day—all of which you can bookmark and read at your leisure.

- Subscription to the Print Magazine. Six handcrafted issues a year that will look great on your coffee table.

- Man At His Best. First-hand accounts of what it’s like to be a man in America now.

- A Weekly Newsletter from the Editor in Chief. Behind-the-scenes intel, including all the stuff that doesn’t make it into print.

- Access to the archive. Every issue of Esquire going all the way back to 1933, featuring the works of many titans of literature and journalism.

- Politics with Charles P. Pierce. Daily stories, a weekly newsletter, and regular conference calls with one of the greatest living political writers.

# With your subscription, you'll enjoy:

- **Quarterly issues of the award-winning *Alta Journal*:** Delivered straight to your door, each issue is filled with captivating stories and insights that celebrate California life.

- **Unlimited, ad-free access:** Dive into altaonline.com with no interruptions, plus explore our exclusive digital archive of past issues.

- **A FREE copy of *California Rewritten* by John Freeman:** This October’s California Book Club selection, valued at $30, is yours to keep as a token of our appreciation.

- **Staying informed with the Alta Weekly Newsletter:** Packed with original reporting, it’s your go-to source for the latest happenings in California and the West.

- **Priority access to exclusive events:** Be the first to discover groundbreaking ideas shaping the future of the West and network with like-minded individuals.

💰A sweet package with plenty of users, add ons & customizability for extra horsepower

#

**Everything from Pro & more:**

✅ **20 Users** for back office or loan officers

✅ **Unlimited** branches

✅ Custom fields

✅ Address auto-suggest & field population

✅ IP address access control

✅ Lender Marketplace & Deal Room

✅ Exclusive Listing in Lender Marketplace

✅ Website template with free hosting

✅ Loan Servicing

✅ White Label

✅ Open API

#

💸 **Add Ons:**

➕ Draw Management [💡]{$495 Monthly, $1336 Quarterly, $2522 Semi-Annually, $4752 Annually}

➕ Pricing Engine [💡]{$537 Quarterly, $1075 Semi-Annually, $1910 Annually}

➕ Custom Fields

➕ Lite Concierge [💡]{2X More likely to go live under 60 days. 2 Hours of live done-with-you implementation Zoom calls with a dedicated representative. 4 Live community training sessions per month. 48 Hour Response time on support tickets. Live chat & phone support}

➕ Full Concierge [💡]{4X More likely to go live under 60 days. 5 Hours of live done-for-you implementation Zoom calls with a dedicated representative. 4 Live community training sessions per month. 24 Hour Response time on support tickets. Live chat & phone support}

➕ Premium Onboarding [💡]{Recommended for getting familiar with the platform and using all of the functionality quickly. 8 x 1 hour sessions with our onboarding team. Live Q&A and guidance through the platform. Getting all your custom settings set up. Troubleshooting any issues with a live team member. Setting up needed integrations faster}

#

🌟 **Included Support:** [Video library](https://www.lendingwise.com/video-library/), tickets, [knowledgebase](https://help.lendingwise.com/knowledge), [LendingWise University](https://courses.lendingwise.com/courses/offers/fcba256d-73f7-4d48-b200-5fbc1886d642) & 1 hour of complimentary implementation support

# Everything included on Starter and

- **Quarterly Free Orthopedic Consultation**

Enjoy a personalized 30-minute online consultation with a Mobility Expert every three months! Using our advanced algorithm, we’ll match you with the perfect specialist for your needs—whether it’s an orthopedist, podiatrist, physiatrist, or another expert. Get tailored advice and recommendations to improve your mobility and overall well-being.

# What's included

- **Foodie Influencer** **Package** — Up to 3 Foodie Influencer visits per month for increased reach and SEO.

- **AI Google Business Profile Manager** -- Dedicated AI Agent keeps your profile optimized and helps you respond to reviews.

- **AI Social Media Manager** — Dedicated AI Agent that manages your accounts and learns which content performed best and improves.

- **AI Text Assistant** — Your Dedicated AI Agent can accept commands from you and your employees over SMS or WhatsApp.

- **Video Editing & Graphic Design** - We provide basic video editing and 3-hours of create custom graphics per month..

- **Up to 10 Social Media Platforms -** We manage accounts across all the manager platforms.

![House Beautiful All Access Membership](https://shop.housebeautiful.com/media/catalog/product/h/o/house-beautiful-all-access-membership-89807.png)

Whatever you're looking for—color inspo, easy DIY ideas, a roundup of under-the-sink organizers—we've got you covered. Get new stories, designer tips, and more every day with complete access to [HouseBeautiful.com](https://www.housebeautiful.com/) and the best design magazine delivered right to you.

# What's included:

- 1-year print magazine subscription (along with instant digital access)

- Unrestricted access to [HouseBeautiful.com](https://www.housebeautiful.com/)

- Exclusive members-only home tours and projects

- A weekly Shop Like a Pro newsletter

- Insider shopping secrets and deals

- Comprehensive resource guides across a range of home and design topics

feat2.rawMD:
# Program Features

- 3 Locking Systems

- Up to 1,000 Cylinders

- Firebird 4 or MS-SQL Server

# Details

> **Everything in "Standard" and:**

- QueryKeeper

- User management, different rights through role profiles

- Depot management with permissions,

- user-dependent possible

- Print outputs freely definable (Reports)

- Advanced copy functions

- Form selection

- Dealer management

- Multilingual (D, NL, UK, E, F, PL, CZ, SK)

- Network-capable as a real client-server (TCP/IP)

- Locking plan creation

- Keys & key rings, pending issues (floating)

- Key issues with time zones

- Key ring management, also across different systems

- Key search across objects

- Search & replace across almost all fields, also filtered

> **License for one distinct physical address or site. Multiple buildings within the same address are covered.*

feat1.rawMD:
# All-in-one G**uest Messaging Platform**

- Comprehensive guest messaging journey: Booking, pre-arrival, in-stay, check-out.

- Targeted bulk message broadcasts.

- Intelligent alerts, feedback, and in-app notifications.

- Escalation to handle urgent requests.

- Quick messaging via smart templates.

- Seamless integration with WhatsApp Business

- .Google Business Messaging functionality.

- WebChat and staff messaging capabilities.

- Enhance reviews and feedback collection through messaging.

# All in one Reputation Platform

- Track reviews across all critical channels

- Gather more and better reviews with smart surveys

- Access comprehensive analytics and notifications.

- Showcase top reviews on your website.

- Tailored brand responses using guestAI across platforms **Tripadvisor, Booking, Hotels.com, Expedia, Google.**

- Comprehensive portfolio performance dashboard

- Regular collaboration with a dedicated Account manager, 24/5 support: Email, Call, WhatsApp

feat1.rawMD:
🚀 For established mid-size broker teams or lenders handling a high volume of loans per month

#

**What's included:**

✅ **5 Users** for back office or loan officer

✅ **Unlimited** brokers [💡]{You can add unlimited brokers to your account. Each Broker will be able to have their own portal to upload docs and submit applications directly to you.}

✅ Point of sale ([Quick App](https://www.veralend.com/get-a-loan) &[ Full App](https://www.veralend.com/multi-step-form))

✅ Built-in docs & forms w/ unlimited E-sign ([Term Sheet](https://app.lendingwise.com/package/pkgController.php?file=Frank_Flipper-Loan_Term_Sheet.pdf&rId=a5b73cb55ffb2a0b&bn=b96bbd80e83aaf7d&lId=6323a31b0c6a6189&pkgID=7ac260486286177b&opt=sample), 1003, [Full App](https://app.lendingwise.com/package/pkgController.php?file=Frank_Flipper-Full_Loan_Application.pdf&rId=a5b73cb55ffb2a0b&bn=b96bbd80e83aaf7d&lId=6323a31b0c6a6189&pkgID=d45df7967cd9c37b&opt=sample) & 20+ more docs)

✅ Dashboard, pipeline, contact manager

✅ Pre-built & customizable settings for fields, workflows, required docs & loan stages

✅ Loan status & doc upload portal

✅ Portals for borrower, broker, & LO's

✅ Unlimited soft pull [💡]{We partnered with Acqualify to provide modeled credit scores using experian credit data. Clients with low scores will be offered credit repair, and you are notified when credit is above your threshold. }

✅ Lender or investor overlays [💡]{Overlay additional fields, workflow steps & required docs based on investor & lender requirements}

✅ Doc wizard (DIY doc templates)

✅ Workflow automation & rules engine with webhooks

✅ Bulk email marketing

✅ Integrations: tri-merge, background, flood, AVM, instant prop insurance quotes, Lightning Docs

✅ [Webform to PDF](https://app.lendingwise.com/backoffice/viewDocuments.php?fn=c48f134c67da4cd427f93c9938581f6c3b0354d8761b3ccc7c7d546ba19d4b5e30901a867d9417f953698a17f999a3bc4fd2e34a25a8ac5625702b7197aae08f3381b169f10a32f78fd719b6fdc21400277d090a37a64307695a1c6316e82581&fd=917859610d92329bbc3da1df2ba3d8ede4ab6a17202da0ecdfd1f83c552a23fe1058936524cddbcfd736749f0ed44598&opt=enc&dn=c48f134c67da4cd427f93c9938581f6c3b0354d8761b3ccc7c7d546ba19d4b5e30901a867d9417f94b159946ce9fbf739a0f2e08bdd5b97835aefaf7d2261740) [💡]{Your digital quick & full app webforms convert to PDF with E-signs. }

✅ Lender Marketplace & Deal Room [💡]{Gain access to hundreds of vetted lenders and submit offers directly to them to get more deals done. Also have the ability to add your own list of lenders to your personal marketplace to submit deals.}

✅ [Website template](https://www.templates.lendingwise.com/) with free hosting

#

💸 **Add Ons:**

➕ Loan Servicing

➕ Draw Management [💡]{$495 Monthly, $1336 Quarterly, $2522 Semi-Annually, $4752 Annually}

➕ Pricing Engine

➕ White Label [💡]{Run the entire platform on your own domain, E-mails sent from your domain & removal of powered by LendingWise logo on webforms. }

➕ Open API

➕ Marketplace Listing

➕ Custom Fields

➕ Lite Concierge [💡]{2X More likely to go live under 60 days. 2 Hours of live done-with-you implementation Zoom calls with a dedicated representative. 4 Live community training sessions per month. 48 Hour Response time on support tickets. Live chat & phone support}

➕ Full Concierge [💡]{4X More likely to go live under 60 days. 5 Hours of live done-for-you implementation Zoom calls with a dedicated representative. 4 Live community training sessions per month. 24 Hour Response time on support tickets. Live chat & phone support}

➕ Premium Onboarding [💡]{Recommended for getting familiar with the platform and using all of the functionality quickly. 8 x 1 hour sessions with our onboarding team. Live Q&A and guidance through the platform. Getting all your custom settings set up. Troubleshooting any issues with a live team member. Setting up needed integrations faster}

#

🌟 **Included Support:** [Video library](https://www.lendingwise.com/video-library/), tickets, [knowledgebase](https://help.lendingwise.com/knowledge), [LendingWise University](https://courses.lendingwise.com/courses/offers/fcba256d-73f7-4d48-b200-5fbc1886d642) & 1 hour of complementary implementation support

**What's included:**

✅ **5 Users** for back office or loan officer

✅ **Unlimited** brokers [💡]{You can add unlimited brokers to your account. Each Broker will be able to have their own portal to upload docs and submit applications directly to you.}

✅ Point of sale ([Quick App](https://www.veralend.com/get-a-loan) &[ Full App](https://www.veralend.com/multi-step-form))

✅ Built-in docs & forms w/ unlimited E-sign ([Term Sheet](https://app.lendingwise.com/package/pkgController.php?file=Frank_Flipper-Loan_Term_Sheet.pdf\&rId=a5b73cb55ffb2a0b\&bn=b96bbd80e83aaf7d\&lId=6323a31b0c6a6189\&pkgID=7ac260486286177b\&opt=sample), 1003, [Full App](https://app.lendingwise.com/package/pkgController.php?file=Frank_Flipper-Full_Loan_Application.pdf\&rId=a5b73cb55ffb2a0b\&bn=b96bbd80e83aaf7d\&lId=6323a31b0c6a6189\&pkgID=d45df7967cd9c37b\&opt=sample) & 20+ more docs)

✅ Dashboard, pipeline, contact manager

✅ Pre-built & customizable settings for fields, workflows, required docs & loan stages

✅ Loan status & doc upload portal

✅ Portals for borrower, broker, & LO's

✅ Unlimited soft pull [💡]{We partnered with Acqualify to provide modeled credit scores using experian credit data. Clients with low scores will be offered credit repair, and you are notified when credit is above your threshold. }

✅ Lender or investor overlays [💡]{Overlay additional fields, workflow steps & required docs based on investor & lender requirements}

✅ Doc wizard (DIY doc templates)

✅ Workflow automation & rules engine with webhooks

✅ Bulk email marketing

✅ Integrations: tri-merge, background, flood, AVM, instant prop insurance quotes, Lightning Docs

✅ [Webform to PDF](https://app.lendingwise.com/backoffice/viewDocuments.php?fn=c48f134c67da4cd427f93c9938581f6c3b0354d8761b3ccc7c7d546ba19d4b5e30901a867d9417f953698a17f999a3bc4fd2e34a25a8ac5625702b7197aae08f3381b169f10a32f78fd719b6fdc21400277d090a37a64307695a1c6316e82581\&fd=917859610d92329bbc3da1df2ba3d8ede4ab6a17202da0ecdfd1f83c552a23fe1058936524cddbcfd736749f0ed44598\&opt=enc\&dn=c48f134c67da4cd427f93c9938581f6c3b0354d8761b3ccc7c7d546ba19d4b5e30901a867d9417f94b159946ce9fbf739a0f2e08bdd5b97835aefaf7d2261740) [💡]{Your digital quick & full app webforms convert to PDF with E-signs. }

✅ Lender Marketplace & Deal Room [💡]{Gain access to hundreds of vetted lenders and submit offers directly to them to get more deals done. Also have the ability to add your own list of lenders to your personal marketplace to submit deals.}

✅ [Website template](https://www.templates.lendingwise.com/) with free hosting

#

💸 **Add Ons:**

➕ Loan Servicing

➕ Draw Management [💡]{$495 Monthly, $1336 Quarterly, $2522 Semi-Annually, $4752 Annually}

➕ Pricing Engine

➕ White Label [💡]{Run the entire platform on your own domain, E-mails sent from your domain & removal of powered by LendingWise logo on webforms. }

➕ Open API

➕ Marketplace Listing

➕ Custom Fields

➕ Lite Concierge [💡]{2X More likely to go live under 60 days. 2 Hours of live done-with-you implementation Zoom calls with a dedicated representative. 4 Live community training sessions per month. 48 Hour Response time on support tickets. Live chat & phone support}

➕ Full Concierge [💡]{4X More likely to go live under 60 days. 5 Hours of live done-for-you implementation Zoom calls with a dedicated representative. 4 Live community training sessions per month. 24 Hour Response time on support tickets. Live chat & phone support}

➕ Premium Onboarding [💡]{Recommended for getting familiar with the platform and using all of the functionality quickly. 8 x 1 hour sessions with our onboarding team. Live Q&A and guidance through the platform. Getting all your custom settings set up. Troubleshooting any issues with a live team member. Setting up needed integrations faster}

#

🌟 **Included Support:** [Video library](https://www.lendingwise.com/video-library/), tickets, [knowledgebase](https://help.lendingwise.com/knowledge), [LendingWise University](https://courses.lendingwise.com/courses/offers/fcba256d-73f7-4d48-b200-5fbc1886d642) & 1 hour of complementary implementation support

feat1.rawMD:
# What's included

✅ Every membership starts with a one-month free trial.

✅ Weekly Tuesday night dance jamming.

✅ Weekly pre-jam class

✅ Last Tuesday of each month (Sept-June) socials and special events.

✅ RDD Online Academy which provides contact improvisation video tutorials with two new ones added each month.

- A few minutes after you sign up you will receive a confirmation email. If you do not, please check your email junk folder.

- ----

- Please note memberships are nonrefundable.

- ----

- With a yearly membership, you can schedule to cancel at the end of your year.

- ----

- Monthly memberships can be canceled at the end of a monthly period.

----

- Monthly memberships can also be paused for up to 90 days multiple times in a one year span.

- ----

- If you are unsure of your plans over the year we recommend choosing a monthly membership.

- ----

- All members are encouraged to volunteer about once a month in support of the jam.

- ----

- **Are drop-ins allowed?** Drop-ins are welcome with a sliding scale cost of $15 to $30 a jam. Just drop in and pay through debit or credit if a membership does not suit you.
feat1.ASTtoMD:
# What's included

✅ Every membership starts with a one-month free trial.

✅ Weekly Tuesday night dance jamming.

✅ Weekly pre-jam class

✅ Last Tuesday of each month (Sept-June) socials and special events.

✅ RDD Online Academy which provides contact improvisation video tutorials with two new ones added each month.

* A few minutes after you sign up you will receive a confirmation email. If you do not, please check your email junk folder.

***

* Please note memberships are nonrefundable.

***

* With a yearly membership, you can schedule to cancel at the end of your year.

***

* Monthly memberships can be canceled at the end of a monthly period.

***

* Monthly memberships can also be paused for up to 90 days multiple times in a one year span.

***

* If you are unsure of your plans over the year we recommend choosing a monthly membership.

***

* All members are encouraged to volunteer about once a month in support of the jam.

***

* **Are drop-ins allowed?** Drop-ins are welcome with a sliding scale cost of $15 to $30 a jam. Just drop in and pay through debit or credit if a membership does not suit you.

🏛️ Reserved for large orgs that need custom pricing, detailed SOW, & various integrations

#

**Everything from Elite and more:**

✅ Customize your number of users

✅ Custom user permission

✅ Custom portals for borrowers, investors, etc..

✅ Custom documents forms (term sheet, loan apps, etc... )

✅ Custom modules & calculations

✅ Custom integrations

✅ Data migration

✅ Exclusive Listing in Lender Marketplace

✅ Loan Servicing

✅ Pricing Engine

✅ White Label

✅ Open API

#

💸 **Add Ons:**

➕ Lite Concierge [💡]{2X More likely to go live under 60 days. 2 Hours of live done-with-you implementation Zoom calls with a dedicated representative. 4 Live community training sessions per month. 48 Hour Response time on support tickets. Live chat & phone support}

➕ Full Concierge [💡]{4X More likely to go live under 60 days. 5 Hours of live done-for-you implementation Zoom calls with a dedicated representative. 4 Live community training sessions per month. 24 Hour Response time on support tickets. Live chat & phone support}

➕ Premium Onboarding [💡]{Recommended for getting familiar with the platform and using all of the functionality quickly. 8 x 1 hour sessions with our onboarding team. Live Q&A and guidance through the platform. Getting all your custom settings set up. Troubleshooting any issues with a live team member. Setting up needed integrations faster}

#

🌟 **Included Support:** [Video library](https://www.lendingwise.com/video-library/), tickets, [knowledgebase](https://help.lendingwise.com/knowledge), [LendingWise University](https://courses.lendingwise.com/courses/offers/fcba256d-73f7-4d48-b200-5fbc1886d642) & 1 hour of complimentary implementation support
